parsed_output.justification: In the dialogue, only one player consistently asserts that they began the game as a Werewolf—Paul. He repeatedly claims “I started as a werewolf” and yet is treated skeptically by others, suggesting his role may have persisted through the troublemaker’s swaps. The other players either claim to be troublemakers or refuse to be werewolves. Consequently the only credible candidate remaining is Paul.
